description: Use this API to return an array of complex values for subsystem owners. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, xarray = aownercplx(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the owner subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem owners to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the owner quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: xarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all owners in the working case.
valid owner subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

flag.description: for only subsystem owners with at least one ac bus assigned to them.
for subsystem owners with any equipment (ac buses, loads, machines, ac branches, FACTS devices, VSC dc lines and/or dc buses) assigned to them.

string.description: Total complex load on the owner’s buses (in MW and Mvar).
Total complex load of the owner’s loads (in MW and Mvar).
Total complex generation on the owner’s buses (in MW and Mvar).
Total complex generation on the owner’s machines (in MW and Mvar).
Total complex losses assigned to the owner (in MW and Mvar).
Total complex power to transformer magnetizing admittance assigned to the owner (in MW and Mvar).
Total complex load on the owner’s buses (units determined by power output option).
Total complex load of the owner’s loads (units determined by power output option).
Total complex generation on the owner’s buses (units determined by power output option).
Total complex generation on the owner’s machines (units determined by power output option).
Total complex losses assigned to the owner (units determined by power output option).
Total complex power to transformer magnetizing admittance assigned to the owner (units determined by power output option).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of XARRAY, is not large enough.
